title: Base64 ↔ File
description: Drop a file to get Base64 / Data URI; paste Base64 to sniff the type (PNG/JPEG/PDF/ZIP magic bytes) and download the restored file. Fully local.

notice.title: Fully local
notice.body: File reading, encoding, magic-byte sniffing and download all run in your browser — nothing is uploaded.

encode.dropCta: Drop a file or click to choose

decode.placeholder: Standard Base64, URL-safe variant, multi-line strings, and data:...;base64,... prefixes are all accepted

error.invalid_length: Impossible length (after stripping whitespace, length mod 4 must not be 1).
